findings.summary: SCART video duplicator with THS7374 4-channel video amp (41 components). Correct: THS7374 pin mapping, SCART connectors pin assignments, audio passthrough, D1 switching voltage protection, USB-C power. Incorrect: CSYNC nets classified as chip_select, RC filter false positives on video termination/bias networks (75-ohm termination and 5.36M DC bias). Missed: video amplifier/buffer topology, 1-to-2 signal splitter pattern.

correct.description: U1 THS7374 all 14 pins correctly mapped
SCART J1 input and J3/J4 output pin assignments correct

incorrect.description: CSYNC_IN/OUT1/OUT2 classified as chip_select (is composite sync)
R5-R8 5.36M DC bias networks detected as filters
R1-R4 75-ohm video termination detected as high-pass filters

suggestions: Avoid matching CS substring in CSYNC/HSYNC/VSYNC names
Recognize 75-ohm resistor to ground at video amplifier input as termination
